stemHtml: During a standard aeromedical check-up, a young pilot has their blood pressure measured. Which of the following statements about the recorded blood pressure values is accurate?

options.a: 135 / 95 mmHg – Both the systolic and diastolic values are much too high, and countermeasures must be taken to reduce it.
options.b: 120 / 70 mmHg – The diastolic value is much too low and countermeasures should be taken.
options.c: 195 / 80 mmHg – Both the systolic and diastolic values are much too high, and countermeasures must be taken.
options.d: 115 / 80 mmHg – The systolic value is too low and countermeasures should be taken.
